strings.KEYWORD_WHIP_SLAM: <style=cKeywordName>Whip Slam</style><style=cSub>Bis tange dum clausus in <style=cIsUtility>aereum</style> hostem ad <style=cIsDamage>deprimendum</style> eos pro <style=cIsDamage>1800% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_CROSS_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIEV: Ut <color=#3060FF>Belmont</color>, inveni furtatum arma in Luna.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_DESCRIPTION:
<color=#3060FF>Belmont</color> est elitarius monstrorum venator cum rectis instrumentis ad quamlibet conditionem, quantumvis diram.<color=#CCD3E0>

< ! > Flagellum infligit tutum vulnus ex distanti sed motus gladii infligit multo plus vulnus in totum.

< ! > Rush est perfectum instrumentum ad accedendum pro lacerando cum gladio tuo.

< ! > Utere Abscond ad oscillandum a volantibus monstris ad cooperiendas magnas distantias.

< ! > Antiqua Flamma potest usus ad facile tollendam turbam.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_JULIUS_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut <color=#3060FF>Belmont</color>, gere omnes sacras reliquias simul.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_LORE:
Hic non pertineo.

Hic mundus foetet <color=#7F364F>corruptione</color>. Non genus quod in cordibus hominum putrescit, nec macula domini vampyri, sed aliquid profundius- antiquius. Haeret in aere, saturat solum, et torquet bestias quae hanc desertam terram vagantur. Luna desuper spectat, remota sed suffocans. Hoc est pravum, sicut aliquid furatum de suo loco recto.

Et tamen, huc adductus sum.

Fatum? Non, numquam talibus notionibus credidi. Iocus crudelis, fortasse, luditus ab aliqua manu invisibili. Uno momento, ventus ululabat per aulas venationis meae, odor sanguinis et veteris lapidis in pulmonibus meis- proximo, cadebam. Caelum erat tempestas ignis, terra cito surgens sub me. <style=cIsHealth>Mori debui.</style>

Potius, sto.

Iterum.

<color=#FF0033>Semper.</color>
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_MONSOON_UNLOCKABLE_ACHI: Ut <color=#3060FF>Belmont</color>, perfice ludum aut dele in Monsoon.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_OUTRO_FAILURE: ..et sic evanuit, nobilis sanguis linea ad finem veniens.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, eius virtuosa via completa.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_PASSIVE_DESCRIPTION: Quoque stadio, <color=#7F364F>Sacrarium Noctis</color> gignitur, praebens <color=#FFFF00>Fragmenta Clavis</color> cum perfecta. Haec adhibentur ad adipiscendum <style=cIsDamage>potentem gear</style> pro <color=#3060FF>Belmont.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_PISTOL_UNLOCKABLE_ACHIE: Ut <color=#3060FF>Belmont</color>, inveni secretum arma in Vacuo.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_PRIMARY_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> Seca pro <style=cIsDamage>260% vulneris</style>. Si target procul est, tunc crepita tuum <style=cIsUtility>flagellum</style> potius pro <style=cIsDamage>700% vulneris</style> ad eos.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_PRIMARY2_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Agilis.</style> Crepita tuum <style=cIsUtility>flagellum</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>500% vulneris</style> ad omnes hostes ante.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SLIDEKICK_DESCRIPTION: <style=cIsUtility>Stupefaciens.</style> Labere antee pro <style=cIsDamage>350% vulneris</style>, te iactans a primo hoste percutito.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_CROSS_DESCRIPTI: Iacta <style=cIsUtility>crucem penetrantem</style> quae percutit pluries pro <style=cIsDamage>250% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_CROSS_SCEPTER_D: Iacta <style=cIsUtility>crucem penetrantem</style> quae percutit pluries pro <style=cIsDamage>250% vulneris</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Iacta tres simul.</color>
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_HOLYCROSS_DESCR: Invoca potestatem <color=#FF0033>Providentiae</color>, dissolvens <style=cIsUtility>massivam flammam</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris per pulsus</style>. Finitur cum <style=cIsDamage>4000% vulneris</style> supernova.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_HOLYWATER_DESCR: Iacta ollam <style=cIsUtility>fragmentorum ignis fatui</style>, explodens et dissolvens <style=cIsUtility>columnas flammae</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_HOLYWATER_SCEPT: Iacta ollam <style=cIsUtility>fragmentorum ignis fatui</style>, explodens et dissolvens <style=cIsUtility>columnas flammae</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Flammae sunt maiores, infligunt 1200% vulneris et relinquunt vestigium ignis in terra.</color>
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_PISTOL_DESCRIPT: Puga <style=cIsUtility>plumbum argenteum</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus capitis</style> infligunt <style=cIsDamage>2x vulnus</style>. Caedes <style=cIsUtility>restituunt omnes frigorationes tuas</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_SPECIAL_PISTOL_SCEPTER_: Puga <style=cIsUtility>plumbum argenteum</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>800% vulneris</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Ictus capitis</style> infligunt <style=cIsDamage>2x vulnus</style>. Caedes <style=cIsUtility>restituunt omnes frigorationes tuas</style>.\n<color=#d299ff>SCEPTRO: Infligit 99999% vulneris.</color>
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_TYPHOON_UNLOCKABLE_ACHI: Ut <color=#3060FF>Belmont</color>, perfice ludum aut dele in Typhoon aut Eclipse.\n<color=#8888>Quisque difficultas Typhoon aut superior computatur</color>
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_UTILITY_DESCRIPTION: Cursor in directionem. <style=cIsUtility>Tene</style> ut deinde osciller a <style=cIsDamage>hoste targetato</style> cum tuo <style=cIsUtility>flagello</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BODY_UTILITY2_DESCRIPTION: Perfice vastum ictum ascendentem pro <style=cIsDamage>1200% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BROTHERSOUL_DESC: Quisque <style=cIsUtility>crepitus flagelli</style> gignit <style=cIsDamage>lunarem flammae pilam</style>, quisque <style=cIsUtility>motus gladii</style> gignit <style=cIsDamage>lunare fragmentum</style>, quisque <style=cIsUtility>ictus flagelli</style> dissolvit <style=cIsDamage>terrain undas impulsum</style> et quisque <style=cIsUtility>cursus</style> generat <style=cIsHealing>20% barrieream</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_BROTHERSOUL_PICKUP: Utere potestate Regis Nihil sicut tua propria.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_CRISSAEGRIM_DESC: Quisque motus gladii percutit <style=cIsUtility>3 additas vices</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>300% vulneris</style> quisque.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_DEVILSHRINE_DESC: Non satis mihi solvi ut haec scribam.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_HOLYCROSS_DESC: Quaque <style=cIsUtility>3</style> minutae, substitue tuam <style=cIsDamage>specialem peritiam</style> per <color=#FF0033>Flammam Sacram</color>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_HOLYCROSS_PICKUP: Acquire aditum ad potentem ultimum impugnationem.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_KEY_DESC: Adhibetur ad aperiendum <color=#FFFF00>Archam Thesaurorum</color>. Hae archae continent <color=#FF0033>reliquiam sacram</color> et gignunt omni <style=cIsUtility>quarto</style> stadio in <style=cIsDamage>loco fixo</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_KEY_PICKUP: Adhibetur ad aperiendum Archam Thesaurorum. Lucet cum prope.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_KEYFRAGMENT_DESC: Fracta clavis pars. Collige 3 ut formet integram clavem.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_KEYFRAGMENT_PICKUP: Fracta clavis pars. Collige 3 ut formet integram clavem.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_MORNINGSTAR_DESC: Quisque ictus flagelli trahit <style=cIsUtility>sequentem explosionem</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>600% vulneris</style>.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_MORNINGSTAR_PICKUP: Flagellum quod destruet omnes qui pertinent ad cognationem noctis.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_WINGEDBOOTS_DESC: Post <style=cIsUtility>1</style> secundam currendi dum <style=cIsUtility>grounded</style>, acquire <style=cIsDamage>12 celeritatem motus</style>. Percutiens hostem cum <style=cIsDamage>Rush</style> causat te calcare eos <style=cIsUtility>in aera</style> et deinde procul, pro <style=cIsDamage>4x200%</style> et <style=cIsDamage>300%</style> vulnus.
strings.ROB_BELMONT_WINGEDBOOTS_PICKUP: Calcei qui meliorant tuam secundariam peritiam et sinunt te currere sicut ventus.
